root_cause: S2C dropped −3.44pp post-Easter driven by a seasonal demand composition shift: lower-intent European tourists and Italian day-trippers in the post period converted at a meaningfully lower rate than the committed Easter-week visitors in the pre period. LY had an identical pattern (structural delta ≈ 0), confirming this is an annually recurring seasonal effect. Supply was ruled out — both limited-capacity TIDs showed zero tickets across all lead-time buckets in both periods, confirming no change in availability between windows.
